name: Alicia’s Tortilleria
content: I went to Alicia’s for breakfast once. It’s a bit of a hole in the wall, but the food was very good and the service was friendly. There is not much seating here, but we were still able to find a table. One of my travel companions decided it would be a good idea to get drunk here at 10 AM. I would recommend going to Alicia’s. I would not recommend day drinking at Alicia’s.
